title: BEGUR & PARTNERS assists Kriscore Capital on investment in RoamPrime
description: BEGUR & PARTNERS has advised Kriscore Capital on its investment in Roamprime Technologies Private Limited through the acquisition of compulsorily convertible preference shares.The transaction team was led by Rajesh Begur, with assistance from Associates Divya Bharti and Arya Choudhary.Rajesh BegurRoamPrime operates a tech-enabled, full-stack platform for refurbished two-wheelers.If you would like your Deals, Columns, Press Releases to be published on Bar & Bench, plea
